dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The orchestration trace demonstrates strong alignment with provided architectural rules. The explicit execution of the alignment-engine step, combined with successful schema validations across all reasoning spans, indicates strict adherence to governance constraints and context loading protocols.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The pipeline exhibits a logical causal progression from context loading to architecture mapping, alignment verification, and finally intent generation. Each step builds upon the previous output, indicating a structured approach to identifying cause-effect relationships in the architectural evolution.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The architecture-work-to-evolution-map and alignment-engine steps suggest systematic identification and resolution of architectural trade-offs. The successful completion of these stages implies that tensions between competing architectural goals were surfaced and reconciled before intent generation.
